examples: Good Loving Do not smooch in the company of others.
I couldn't really give it a name - it was more of a smooch.
Just a quick smooch can give this to your partner or even your children.
Families bite into crispy churros, kids leap for airborne strands of cotton candy, taco meat sizzles on hotplates, people take photos in front of lit-up fountains and couples smooch on benches.
We sit and doze, while they bicker and smooch.
